check_content_excerpt:
Verify that file systems used for removable media are mounted with the "nosuid" option with the following command: 
 
$ sudo more /etc/fstab 
 
UUID=2bc871e4-e2a3-4f29-9ece-3be60c835222 /mnt/usbflash vfat noauto,owner,ro,nosuid,nodev,noexec 0 0 
 
If a file system found in "/etc/fstab" refers to removable media and it does not have the "nosuid" option set, this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Configure the "/etc/fstab" to use the "nosuid" option on file systems that are associated with removable media.
title: OL 8 must prevent files with the setuid and setgid bit set from being executed on file systems that are used with removable media.
